name: 9p13_olfactory_receptor_cluster
description: 9p13.3 olfactory receptor (OR) gene cluster, one of multiple OR clusters scattered genome-wide. Highly paralogous (>85% intra-cluster identity), variable copy number between haplotypes. Forms one substrate of the OR family that drives CNV at multiple chromosomes (8p23.1, 11q11, 14q11, etc.).

architecture.internal_structure: ~10-20 OR genes in tandem at 9p13.3 (OR2S, OR13, OR1J families); pseudogene-rich; serves as PSV-rich paralog family across genome.
